calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Off Calendar

Declaration Of William Ocampo In Support Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Not Reported.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A. is represented by Yvonne Browning, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Andy Choe not appearing.

The Court has reviewed the moving papers, Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Mesa Underwriters Specialty Insurance Company, and against Defendant Cloud of Goods, Inc., a corporation, as follows:

Damages: $82,902.09
Attorneys fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $541.76

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $86,268.85

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Continued To Feb-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
